prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog body illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor.

Scene: Avilia cleans up a tangled module web into several calm zones: data layer, strategy layer, backtest layer, visualization layer, report layer. She leaves thin reusable paths between them.

Core meaning: the real task is not only code ability, but keeping the whole architecture clear.

Style: calm Chinese technical blog illustration, white space, black/red/white, small blue connection dots. Minimal labels: "分层", "清晰", "可维护".

Avoid formal UML, avoid dense labels, avoid PPT style.
